raw_consumer_statement: Continuous problems with Amex going back a far as two year 's ago - they closed my business gold card account even though they were wrong in doing so and eventually credited me for only one of the disputed amounts they were supposed to ( please see my one and only claim with CFPB ) - XXXX XXXX XXXX  - XXXX XXXX XXXX and agreed to do so in a letter I received via AMEX XXXX but kept going back and forth and sending all different emails validating the disputed charge and then saying they did not approve it and it kept changing constantly. This not only hurt my credit score since they closed my account before I could settle this with the help of the CFPB but it continues to be a problem as they are not willing to clear up another erroneous charge that they re-billed to my account one whole year after in was credited from XXXX XXXX. I had asked them to send me a full accounting of this in several phone call attempts and none of the customer service agents could explain why this charge was rebiller dot my account a whole year later. Ive grown very Leary of AMEX and their business practices since having had my last issue with them. Their ways have hurt my business and I'm looking into seeking representation given the fact that they closed my account last year when I still had outstanding disputes going on. This left me without any way to access my online account and view transactions and use this card and have been an upstanding business partner since XXXX
